string.text: Friend of the Bandits
Your relations with the Bandits have improved.
You have helped the Bandits many times. Now the traders of this faction will offer you more and rarer goods.
Achievement received: Friend of the Bandits.
Friend of Duty
Your relations with Duty have improved.
You have helped Duty members many times. Now the traders of this faction will offer you more and rarer goods.
Achievement received: Friend of Duty.
Friend of the Scientists
Your relations with the Scientists have improved.
You have helped the Scientists many times. Now the traders of this faction will offer you more and rarer goods.
Achievement received: Friend of the Scientists.
Friend of Freedom
Your relations with Freedom have improved.
You have helped Freedom many times. Now the traders of this faction will offer you more and rarer goods.
Achievement received: Friend of Freedom.
Friend of the Mercenaries
Your relations with the Mercenaries have improved.
You have helped the Mercenaries many times. Now the traders of this faction will offer you more and rarer goods.
Achievement received: Friend of the Mercenaries.
Friend of the Military
Your relations with the Military have improved.
You have helped the Military many times. Now the traders of this faction will offer you more and rarer goods.
Achievement received: Friend of the Military.
Friend of Monolith
Your relations with Monolith have improved.
You have helped Monolith many times. Now the traders of this faction will offer you more and rarer goods.
Achievement received: Friend of Monolith.
Friend of the Stalkers
Your relations with the Stalkers have improved.
You have helped the Stalkers many times. Now the traders of this faction will offer you more and rarer goods.
Achievement received: Friend of the Stalkers.
Friend of Clear Sky
Your relations with Clear Sky have improved.
You have helped Clear Sky many times. Now the traders of this faction will offer you more and rarer goods.
Achievement received: Friend of Clear Sky.
Friend of Sin
Your relations with Sin have improved.
You have helped the Sinners many times. Now the traders of this faction will offer you more and rarer goods.
Achievement received: Friend of Sin.
Friend of Dawn
Your relations with Dawn have improved.
You have helped Dawn many times. Now the traders of this faction will offer you more and rarer goods.
Achievement received: Friend of Dawn.
Friend of ISG
Your relations with ISG have improved.
You have helped ISG many times. Now the traders of this faction will offer you more and rarer goods.
Achievement received: Friend of ISG.
Pioneer
A collection of new data allowed Professors Hermann and Ozersky to synthesize an experimental anabiotic under Zone conditions.
Whatever new appears in the Zone, you're ready to be the first to explore it. By discovering previously unknown anomalous formations, you have advanced scientific understanding of the Zone.
Mutant Hunter
Stalkers have started treating you with more respect. As a small token of gratitude, they occasionally leave ammunition in your personal stash at the Yanov station.
You don’t avoid dangerous mutants — you hunt them, and you’ve become quite skilled at it. Good hunters are well-respected among stalkers.
Novice Bandit
The Bandits are pleased with you — a reward awaits their hero!
You're starting to gain favor with the Bandits — success is just around the corner!
Experienced Bandit
You’ve earned the trust of the Bandits — don’t forget to claim your reward.
You’re climbing the ranks quickly — becoming a Boss isn’t far off now!
Legendary Bandit
The boys respect and fear you — your reward will be worthwhile.
Every local Bandit knows your deeds — you’ve become an authority among them.
Novice Duty Member
Duty is pleased with you — a reward awaits their hero!
You’re starting to gain favor with Duty — success is just around the corner!
Experienced Duty Member
You’ve earned Duty’s trust — don’t forget to claim your reward.
You’re moving up the ranks quickly — promotion to Major isn’t far off!
Legendary Duty Member
Duty respects you — the reward will be generous.
Local factions know of your deeds — you’ve become the top fighter among Duty members.
Junior Research Associate
The scientists are pleased with you — a reward awaits their hero!
You’re starting to gain favor with the scientists — success is just around the corner!
Experienced Research Associate
You’ve earned the Scientists’ trust — don’t forget to claim your reward.
You’re progressing well in your career — promotion to Lab Technician is within reach!
Legendary Research Associate
The Scientists respect you — the reward will be generous.
Local factions are aware of your accomplishments — you've become a legend among the Scientists.
Junior Freedom Fighter
Freedom is pleased with you — a reward awaits their hero!
You’re starting to earn the favor of Freedom — success is just around the corner!
Experienced Freedom Fighter
You’ve earned the trust of Freedom — don’t forget to claim your reward.
You’re advancing steadily in your career — squad commander isn’t far off!
Legendary Freedom Fighter
Freedom respects you — the reward will be worthwhile.
Local factions are aware of your feats — you've become a legend among the Freedom members.
Rookie Mercenary
The Mercenaries are pleased with you — a reward awaits their hero!
You’re starting to gain favor with the Mercenaries — success is on the horizon!
Experienced Mercenary
You’ve earned the Mercenaries’ trust — don’t forget to claim your reward.
You’re advancing well in your career — commanding your own squad isn’t far off!
Legendary Mercenary
The Mercenaries respect you — the reward will be worthwhile.
Local factions are aware of your feats — you’ve become the most dangerous of the Mercenaries.
Rookie Soldier
The Military are pleased with you — a reward awaits their hero!
You’re starting to gain favor with the Military — success is on the horizon!
Experienced Soldier
You’ve earned the Military's trust — don’t forget to claim your reward.
You’re advancing well in your career — promotion to Major isn’t far off!
Legendary Soldier
The Military respects you — the reward will be worthwhile.
Local factions are aware of your feats — you’ve become the best fighter among the Military.
Rookie Monolith
The Holy Monolith is pleased with you — a reward awaits their chosen one!
You’re starting to gain favor with the Monolith followers — success is on the horizon!
Experienced Monolith
You’ve earned the Holy Monolith's trust — don’t forget to claim your reward.
You’re advancing well in your path — the Holy Monolith is pleased!
Legendary Monolith
The Holy Monolith has seen potential in you — the reward will be generous.
Local factions are aware of your feats — you have become the best fighter of the Monolith.
Rookie Stalker
The Stalkers are pleased with you — a reward awaits their hero!
You’re starting to gain favor with the Stalkers — success is on the horizon!
Experienced Stalker
You’ve earned the Stalkers’ trust — don’t forget to claim your reward.
You’re advancing well in your career — becoming a Zone Legend isn’t far off!
Zone Legend
The Stalkers respect you — the reward will be worthy.
Local factions know of your exploits — you have become a Legend of the Zone.
Rookie Clear Sky
Clear Sky is pleased with you — a reward awaits their hero!
You’re starting to gain favor with Clear Sky — success is near!
Experienced Clear Sky
You’ve earned Clear Sky’s trust — don’t forget to claim your reward.
You’re advancing well in your career, soon to become their best fighter!
Legendary Clear Sky
Clear Sky respects you — the reward will be generous.
Local factions know of your deeds — you have become Clear Sky’s best fighter.
Rookie Maniac
Sin is pleased with you — a reward awaits their hero!
You’re starting to gain favor with Sin — success is near!
Experienced Maniac
You’ve earned Sin’s trust — don’t forget to claim your reward.
You’re climbing the ranks, leaving behind a trail of blood and dismembered bodies!
Legendary Maniac
Sin respects you — the reward will be generous.
Local factions are aware of your deeds — you have become the most ruthless maniac of the Zone.
Rookie Renegade
Renegades are pleased with you — a reward awaits their hero!
You’re starting to gain favor with the Renegades — success is near!
Experienced Renegade
You’ve earned the Renegades’ trust — don’t forget to claim your reward.
You’re advancing well in your career — maybe betraying your old faction wasn’t in vain?
Legendary Renegade
Renegades respect you — the reward will be generous.
Local factions know of your deeds — you betrayed your old faction but made the Renegades dangerous.
Rookie Rasvet Member
Rasvet is pleased with you — a reward awaits their hero!
You’re starting to gain favor with Rasvet — success is near!
Experienced Rasvet Member
You’ve earned Rasvet’s trust — don’t forget to claim your reward.
You’re advancing well in your career — maybe there’s a chance for a comeback?
Legendary Rasvet Member
Rasvet respects you — the reward will be generous.
Local factions know of your deeds — you helped the leaders revive the group.
Rookie Agent
ISG is pleased with you — a reward awaits their hero!
You’re starting to gain favor with ISG — success is near!
Experienced Agent
You’ve earned ISG’s trust — don’t forget to claim your reward.
You’re advancing well in your career — no witnesses? Good!
Legendary Agent
ISG respects you — the reward will be generous.
Local factions know of your deeds — don’t plan on leaving the Zone yet, this is just the beginning!
Rookie PMC Fighter
Spectrum is pleased with you — a reward awaits their hero!
You’re starting to gain favor with Spectrum — success is near!
Experienced PMC Fighter
You’ve earned Spectrum’s trust — don’t forget to claim your reward.
You’re advancing well in your career — no one can stop you!
Legendary PMC Fighter
Spectrum respects you — the reward will be generous.
Local factions are aware of your deeds — unknown figures are pleased with you!
Friend of Spectrum
Your relationship with Spectrum has improved.
You have helped Spectrum many times. Now the traders of this faction will offer you more and rarer goods.
Achievement unlocked: Friend of Spectrum.
Terrorism
Last Day is pleased with you — a reward awaits their hero!
You’re starting to gain favor with Last Day — success is near!
Tamer of Terrorism
You’ve earned the trust of Last Day — don’t forget to claim your reward.
You’re advancing well in your career — you’re worse than Black September!
Creator of Terrorism
Last Day respects you — the reward will be generous.
Local factions are aware of your deeds — your actions will not go unpunished!
Friend of Last Day
Your relationship with Last Day has improved.
You have helped Last Day many times. Now the traders of this faction will offer you more and rarer goods.
Achievement unlocked: Friend of Last Day.
